# Change summary

## Scope

- [ ] No unrelated changes are included.
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, private hosts, dumps, or personal data are included.
- [ ] Existing read-only and JSON contracts remain compatible, or the impact is explicitly reviewed.

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant unit/adapter tests pass.
- [ ] Existing Provider/Tool/Workflow regression passes with zero unexplained SKIP.
- [ ] Machine-readable evidence is attached or linked.
- [ ] Documentation, compatibility, limitations, and test matrix are updated when needed.

## Vendor and licensing

- [ ] New dependencies and licenses are listed.
- [ ] Driver redistribution and supported platforms are documented.

Describe the change, reason, evidence, and rollback plan below.
